ddl.value: ("opening_balance_minor" IS NULL AND "opening_balance_date" IS NULL) OR ("opening_balance_minor" IS NOT NULL AND "opening_balance_date" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: accounts_opening_balance_pair_check

ddl.value: length("rate") > 0 AND "rate" NOT GLOB '*[^0-9.]*' AND "rate" <> '.' AND (length("rate") - length(replace("rate", '.', ''))) <= 1 AND substr("rate", 1, 1) <> '.' AND substr("rate", length("rate"), 1) <> '.'
ddl.name: exchange_rates_rate_check

ddl.value: ("foreign_amount_minor" IS NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" IS NULL) OR ("foreign_amount_minor" IS NOT NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" IS NOT NULL AND "foreign_currency_code" GLOB '[A-Z][A-Z][A-Z]')
ddl.name: transaction_postings_foreign_pair_check
